data.services.yaml:
services:
  # Backend Monolith - Main FlowMaster Backend
  backend-service:
    url: "http://monolith-backend:8000"
    health_check: "/api/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Main FlowMaster backend monolith with all core APIs"
  # Authentication Service
  auth-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-auth-service:9001"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 10
    retries: 3
    description: "Authentication and authorization service"
  # Internal DataHub Service
  internal-datahub-service:
    url: "http://internal-datahub-service:9004"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Internal data hub for cross-service data synchronization"
  # Process Design Service
  process-design-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-process-design-service:9003"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "BPMN process design and modeling service"
  # Execution Engine Service
  execution-engine:
    url: "http://flowmaster-execution-engine-service:9005"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 2
    description: "Process execution engine with state management"
  # Human Task Service
  human-task-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-human-task-service:9006"
    health_check: "/health/live"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Human task assignment and management"
  # Document Intelligence Service
  document-intelligence-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-document-intelligence-service:9002"
    health_check: "/health/live"
    timeout: 120
    retries: 2
    description: "AI-powered document processing and process extraction"
  # Scheduling Service
  scheduling-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-scheduling-service:9008"
    health_check: "/health/live"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Cron triggers, time-based process automation, timezone-aware schedules"
  # AI Agent Service
  ai-agent-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-ai-agent-service:9006"
    health_check: "/api/v1/health"
    timeout: 120
    retries: 2
    description: "AI Agent orchestration, session management, and LLM integration"
  # Data Hub Service (External)
  data-hub-service:
    url: "http://data-hub-service:9004"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "External data integration and ETL service"
  # Notification Service
  notification-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-notification-service:9011"
    health_check: "/health/live"
    timeout: 10
    retries: 3
    description: "Multi-channel notification service (email, SMS, push, in-app)"
  # WebSocket Gateway
  websocket-gateway:
    url: "http://flowmaster-websocket-gateway-service:9010"
    ws_url: "ws://flowmaster-websocket-gateway-service:9010"
    health_check: "/api/v1/ws/health/liveness"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
    description: "Real-time WebSocket communication gateway"
  # Admin Service
  admin-service:
    url: "http://admin-service:9012"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
    description: "Administrative operations and system management"
  # Data Intelligence Service
  data-intelligence-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-data-intelligence-service:9015"
    health_check: "/health/live"
    timeout: 120
    retries: 2
    description: "AI-powered data mapping, schema discovery, and field analysis"
  # Communication Service
  communication-service:
    url: "http://communication-service:9011"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 15
    retries: 3
    description: "Multi-channel communication orchestration"
  # Audit and Compliance Service
  audit-compliance-service:
    url: "http://audit-compliance-service:9012"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 2
    description: "Audit logging and compliance management"
  # Event Bus Service
  event-bus-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-event-bus-service:9013"
    health_check: "/v1/monitoring/health"
    timeout: 10
    retries: 3
    description: "Event-driven messaging and pub/sub service"
  # Portal Management Service
  portal-management-service:
    url: "http://portal-management-service:9014"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Multi-tenant portal configuration and management"
  # Service Registry
  service-registry:
    url: "http://service-registry:9015"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 10
    retries: 3
    description: "Service discovery and health monitoring"
  # DXG Service - Dynamic Experience Generator
  dxg-service:
    url: "http://dxg-backend:8000"  # Internal port is 8000, external is 8005
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 2
    description: "AI-powered dynamic UI component and form generation"
  # External Integration Service
  external-integration-service:
    url: "http://external-integration-service:9014"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 3
    description: "External system connectors, webhook management, and third-party API integration"
  # Process Analytics Service
  process-analytics-service:
    url: "http://process-analytics-service:9014"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Process performance metrics, bottleneck detection, and analytics dashboards"
  # Legal Entity Service
  legal-entity-service:
    url: "http://legal-entity-service:8014"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Organizational structure, legal entities, and relationship management"
  # Business Rules Engine Service
  rules-engine-service:
    url: "http://rules-engine-service:8018"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "DMN-style decision tables, rule evaluation, and business logic management"
  # BAC Marketplace Service
  bac-marketplace-service:
    url: "http://bac-marketplace-service:9015"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Process marketplace for publishing, downloading, and sharing processes"
  # Knowledge Hub Service
  knowledge-hub-service:
    url: "http://knowledge-hub-service:8009"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 3
    description: "RAG, knowledge management, agent data access, and feedback capture"
  # Agent Learning Service
  agent-learning-service:
    url: "http://agent-learning-service:9016"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Agent personas, skills management, and learning from feedback"
  # Prompt Engineering Service
  prompt-engineering-service:
    url: "http://prompt-engineering-service:8012"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Prompt templates, versioning, and dynamic assembly for LLM interactions"
  # Process Views Service
  process-views-service:
    url: "http://process-views-service:8019"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Flow chart views and process visualization"
  # Process Versioning Service
  process-versioning-service:
    url: "http://process-versioning-service:8020"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Process version management, diff, and branching"
  # Process Linking Service
  process-linking-service:
    url: "http://process-linking-service:8021"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Cross-process dependencies and linking"

  # SDX Service - Smart Data Exchange
  sdx-service:
    url: "http://sdx:9027"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Smart Data Exchange - unified data access layer for connections, datasources, and native tables"
  # SDX Stream Service - Real-time data streaming
  sdx-stream-service:
    url: "http://sdx-stream:8600"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "SDX Stream - real-time data streaming and event processing"

  # Import/Export Service
  import-export-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-import-export-service:8005"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 2
    description: "Data import/export service supporting JSON, CSV, BPMN XML formats"

  # Settings Service
  settings-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-settings-service:8031"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "System settings, user preferences, and configuration management"

  # Credential Vault Service
  credential-vault-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-credential-vault-service:9016"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Secure credential storage and management for external integrations"

  # KMS Service (Key Management Service)
  kms-service:
    url: "http://flowmaster-kms-service:9017"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Encryption key management and cryptographic operations"

  # Agent Manager Service
  agent-manager-service:
    url: "http://agent-manager-service:9018"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "AI agent lifecycle management and orchestration"

  # Encryption Service
  encryption-service:
    url: "http://encryption-service:9019"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Data encryption/decryption and cryptographic utilities"

  # LLM Integration Service
  llm-integration-service:
    url: "http://llm-integration-service:9020"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 60
    retries: 2
    description: "LLM provider integration and model management"

  # Role Management Service
  role-management-service:
    url: "http://role-management-service:9021"
    health_check: "/health"
    timeout: 30
    retries: 3
    description: "Role-based access control and permission management"
